examples: … Robyne is my cuz, part of that ever-growing Fambro clan.
… a laughing group of cousins are gathered at Jan's home ("Hi, cuzzes!" says one, upon entering) …
Now [Triston] McKenzie refers to [CC] Sabathia as his “cuz,” one who returned to Cleveland to watch his mentee's first playoff start …

data.text: —used as a friendly way of addressing someone and especially a man or boy
examples: … Robyne is my cuz, part of that ever-growing Fambro clan.
… a laughing group of cousins are gathered at Jan's home ("Hi, cuzzes!" says one, upon entering) …
Now [Triston] McKenzie refers to [CC] Sabathia as his “cuz,” one who returned to Cleveland to watch his mentee's first playoff start …
“Why aren't you at work now?” “Cuz I got laid off, man!”
